summary: Frontend-only verification of the reworked /the-development masterplan (pin glow + floating card removed; replaced with always-visible 4-card building-breakdown grid). All 7 review criteria passed on both desktop (1920) and mobile (390).

cta_navigation.note: 16 units listed on /residences matches Heliconia total — filter applied correctly

critical_code_review_comments: DEVELOPMENT_BUILDINGS in constants.js still exposes a `pin: {x, y}` property on each building, but it is no longer consumed by DevelopmentPage.jsx (pins were removed). Consider deleting the `pin` field to keep constants lean (low priority, cosmetic).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was not retested per request (iteration_3 had 31/31 passing). DevelopmentPage masterplan section is now a static image followed by [data-testid=building-breakdown] containing 4 cards (building-heliconia/hibiscus/ginger-lily/begonia) each with a building-cta-<name> link. Numbers are computed live from /api/units via useUnits hook. Mobile 390px stacks cards single-column with no horizontal overflow. All review acceptance criteria met.
